next_steps: Open http://<ct-ip>:8080 from the LAN and sign in as admin (vault HDC_STIRLING_PDF_ADMIN_PASSWORD).
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/stirling-pdf-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Optional later: set stirling_pdf.public_url, add BIND A record and nginx-waf upstream (raise client_max_body_size for large PDFs).
